This family consists of cypress and cypress-like trees, commonly found in various parts of the world. Cupressus articulata is further classified into the genus Cupressus, which includes multiple species of cypress trees. The species Cupressus articulata is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. It is a member of the phylum Pinophyta, which includes all coniferous plants.
